Correct. The second broadcast barrage aligns with the Singapore pass segment (~38-69 min), so operators are keyed through Singapore during that jam.

questions.title: Downlink Jamming: What action mitigates a sustained downlink jam during a ground-station pass?
questions.description: Which of the following options would be the best immediate mitigation when a downlink jam is occurring?

options: Waiting for the Attack to End
reason: Resetting the antenna would not help with the downlink jamming attack.
Rebooting the computer would not help with the downlink jamming attack.
Cycling the encryption key would not help with the downlink jamming attack.
Downlinking data would not help with the downlink jamming attack.
Frequency hopping would help with the downlink jamming attack by moving to an unjammed frequency.
Waiting for the attack to end would not help with the downlink jamming attack.
